结节病.summary: 该全国性结节病队列研究显示，年龄、晚期肺部影像及多器官受累是死亡率显著预测因素。

结节病.title: Nonsteroid treatment options in (pulmonary) sarcoidosis. When to consider and why?
结节病.authors: Spagnolo P, Miedema J
结节病.summary: 肺结节病初始治疗应优先考虑甲氨蝶呤，因其疗效不劣于泼尼松且能避免激素毒性。

结节病.title: Abdominal manifestations of multisystem diseases: a pattern-based imaging review.
结节病.authors: Saeed S, Zhao J, Shi J, Sommer D, Mingo S, Ibrahim S, Helmy Y, Yaghmai V, Helmy M
结节病.summary: 多系统疾病常累及腹部，基于模式的影像学分析有助于早期诊断。

ILD.title: Changes in Interstitial Lung Disease Nomenclature.
ILD.authors: Wells AU, Rajan SK
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Lung disease in rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Bendstrup E, Dieude P, Kreuter M, Hoffmann-Vold AM, Cottin V, Hauge EM
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎患者常见肺受累如间质性肺病和气道疾病，吸烟增加风险，需CT筛查但治疗有限。

ILD.title: Defining interstitial lung disease related to idiopathic inflammatory myopathies: a systematic review protocol of the Myositis Clinical Trial Consortium (MCTC).
ILD.authors: Triantafyllias K, Gomez R, Paul J, Appenzeller S, Bartoloni E, Benitez A, de Araujo DB, Dominguez SA, Ejaz K, Fanouriakis A, Houghton K, Janssen M, Keshavamurthy C, Khoury M, Kivity S, Landon-Cardinal O, Lopez I, Marketos N, Marrani E, Marsden JW, Mavragani C, Ngamjanyaporn P, Perelas A, Pimentel-Quiroz V, Tzilas V, Gil JDU, Vehar S, Wilson G, Wilfong E, Papadopoulou C, Aggarwal R, Hallowell R, Nagaraja V, Pais F, Joerns EK

ILD.title: Predictors of rapidly progressive interstitial lung disease in anti-MDA5 dermatomyositis: a meta-analysis.
ILD.authors: Liu T, Ji X, Wei Y, Zhong Y, Zhu J, Wang C, Li M
ILD.summary: 抗MDA5皮肌炎中，高龄、男性、发热、皮肤溃疡及关节炎等临床特征和实验室指标可预测快速进展性间质性肺病。

ILD.title: Lung ultrasound in interstitial lung disease: from bedside screening to prognostic integration and AI-assisted standardization.
ILD.authors: Yang J, Lin Y, Bai J, Zhu Z, Lian X
ILD.summary: 肺超声通过评估B线和胸膜线异常，可作为间质性肺病床边筛查、预后评估及AI辅助标准化的无辐射工具。

ILD.title: Type I interferon pathway activation in connective tissue disease associated interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Defesche TM, Koudstaal T, Versnel MA, Corneth OBJ, Brkic Z
ILD.summary: 结缔组织病相关间质性肺病中I型干扰素通路激活与肺功能加速下降相关。

ILD.title: Imaging Spectrum of Childhood Interstitial Lung Diseases: Focus on Disorders Not Specific to Infancy.
ILD.authors: Ikeda O, Tsujioka Y, Nishimura G, Yamada Y, Sugiura H, Nishi E, Shimizu K, Kono T, Jinzaki M
ILD.summary: 高分辨率CT是诊断儿童间质性肺病的核心工具，可显示磨玻璃影、网织影及肺囊肿等征象。

ILD.title: The evolving comorbidity landscape of rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Brooks RT, England BR, Kronzer VL, Crowson CS
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎的合并症模式已演变，间质性肺病、焦虑和抑郁负担持续增高。

ILD.title: Diagnostic, prognostic and therapeutic biomarkers in rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Szekanecz Z, Gunkl-Toth L, Szamosi S, van der Woude D, McInnes I, Nagy G
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎需开发诊断、预后及治疗生物标记物，以实现早期干预和精准治疗。

ILD.title: Tracking interstitial lung disease in systemic sclerosis: integrating lung magnetic resonance imaging into a clinically oriented multimodal follow-up strategy.
ILD.authors: Di Battista M, Romei C, Barsotti S, Marcucci A, Uggenti V, Ghezzi G, Delle Sedie A, Della Rossa A, Neri E, Mosca M
ILD.summary: 肺核磁共振在系统性硬化症间质性肺病监测中与高分辨率CT一致性达64.3%，T1增强序列与肺功能DLCO显著相关。

ILD.title: Occupational interstitial lung disease requiring living-donor lung transplantation: multielement deposition in explanted lungs.
ILD.authors: Sugino K, Ono H, Igarashi S, Hebisawa A
ILD.summary: 长期职业性吸入多元素工业粉尘可导致需肺移植的重度间质性肺病。

ILD.summary: AI辅助非专家放射科医师识别高分辨率CT上的三种间质性肺病模式，提高了诊断准确性。

ILD.title: A statistical model for lung function trajectory and mortality in patients with fibrotic interstitial lung disease.
ILD.journal: Am J Respir Crit Care Med
ILD.authors: Wendelberger B, Jensen TP, Quintana M, Stewart I, Molyneaux PL, Maher TM, Oldham JM, Johnson SR, Fahy WA, Khan F, Saini G, Abdulqawi R, Allen R, Baldi BG, Chaudhuri N, Corte TJ, Cottin V, Funke-Chambour M, Glaspole I, Holland AE, Johannson KA, Khor YH, Kreuter M, Kulkarni T, Molina-Molina M, Martinez FJ, Montesi SB, Nathan SD, Piccari L, Rajan S, Rivera-Ortega P, Ryerson CJ, Sakamoto K, Wain LV, Wells AU, Adams W, Kawano-Dourado L, Jenkins RG, Lewis RJ
ILD.summary: 该模型联合分析肺功能下降与死亡风险，能更准确地估计纤维化间质性肺病患者用力肺活量年下降率。

ILD.title: Integrated machine learning risk model for predicting radiation pneumonitis in lung cancer patients with interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Lu H, Jiang A, Yuan Z, Chen D
ILD.summary: 机器学习模型整合临床、剂量和炎症指标，可有效预测肺癌合并间质性肺病患者的放射性肺炎风险。

ILD.title: Metagenomic characterization of gut microbiota in rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: taxonomic shifts and clinical correlations.
ILD.authors: Fan R, Zang Q, Xu Y, Gao L, Zhou J, Zang Y
ILD.summary: RA-ILD患者粪便菌群中大肠杆菌/志贺菌富集，罗斯氏菌和瘤胃球菌减少，与肺功能指标相关。

ILD.title: A narrative review on the interplay between interstitial lung disease and obstructive sleep apnea: Mechanisms, clinical implications, and management strategies.
ILD.authors: Ocal N, Balcan B, Peker Y
ILD.summary: ILD合并OSA患者因限制性通气障碍和夜间低氧形成独特OSA表型，间歇性缺氧可能加重ILD不良结局，但因果关系尚需证实。

ILD.title: Impact of pre-transplantation exposure to immunosuppressive agents on lung transplant outcomes in interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Tazibet K, Bunel V, Mal H, Goletto T, Halitim P, Morer L, Mouren D, Salpin M, Sandot A, Weisenburger G, Montravers P, Atchade E, Tanaka S, Frija J, Hajouji L, Castier Y, Mordant P, Crestani B, Borie R, El Husseini K
ILD.summary: ILD患者移植前1年内使用非甾体免疫抑制剂会显著降低12个月无再移植生存率并增加术后并发症。

ILD.title: Evaluation of Large Language Models for Structured Data Extraction From Interstitial Lung Disease Clinical Notes: Comparative Study.
ILD.authors: Chen SJ, Maddali MV, Langlotz C, Bluethgen C, Chen J, Raj R
ILD.summary: 大型语言模型可从间质性肺病临床笔记中高效提取结构化数据。

ILD.authors: Zhang G, Zhang L, Jiang M, Shen Y, Luo J, Wang Y
ILD.summary: CTD-ILD患者中未用免疫抑制剂和UIP型是肺癌独立危险因素，且肺癌预后差。
